title: Set up Auth0 authentication in Next.js
summary: Install @auth0/nextjs-auth0, configure the route handler, protect pages with middleware, and access the session in both Server and Client Components.
declaration: I will set up Auth0 authentication using the official @auth0/nextjs-auth0 SDK. This wires Auth0 Universal Login into your Next.js App Router with zero custom login forms. You need an Auth0 account (auth0.com) and a Regular Web Application created in the dashboard.
